name: Proxyma
short_description: Proxyma is a hardcore retro-style 2D platformer that challenges you to finish 13 increasingly hard levels in a single run.
detailed_description:
Locked inside a computer called Proxyma, you must finish its 13-levels game to be completely free. Proxyma is a retro-style 2D platformer with increasingly hard levels where you have to run, jump on various platforms and drop bricks to destroy enemies, open gates and reach for the end.

Key features:

  • 13 levels with increasing difficulty;

  • Three lives per run;

  • Two modes: easy and hard (no continues);

  • Run, jump and brick-drop;

  • Trampolines;

  • Various platform types (moving, falling etc.);

  • Retro-style graphics.
